creator: c.brinkhaus@t-online.de
text:
In https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/firewalls-pf.html
"Table 29.1. Useful pfctl Options" the handbook says
pfctl -s [ rules | nat state ]
which should be
pfctl -s [ rules | nat | state ]
if I am not wrong. This is of course just a super minor typo.

Kind regards,
Christoph
